17703804.summary: Pershing Square Holdings will publish its 2026 semiannual financial statements on August 13, 2026, including the Investment Manager's quarterly portfolio review. Concurrently, parent company Pershing Square Inc. will release Q2 2026 results and host an earnings call. CEO Bill Ackman and CIO Ryan Israel will then conduct a live Q&A on X at 3:00 p.m. BST (10:00 a.m. ET), open to investors, media and the public, with replay available via the investor relations website.
17703804.brief: PSH to release H1 2026 financial statements and host investor Q&A on August 13, 2026.
17703804.take: Routine disclosure of scheduled financial results publication; the live Q&A adds engagement value but represents standard investor relations activity with no material news implications.

17703850.summary: Heights Capital Management, Inc. (via CVI Investments, Inc.) crossed a notifiable threshold in Faron Pharmaceuticals OY on 22 July 2026, building a total position of 20.52% of voting rights. The stake comprises 46.8 million direct voting rights (20.52%) and 28.6 million potential voting rights from convertible bonds expiring February 2027 and 2028 (12.53%). This represents a decrease from the previous notification position of 21.41%, indicating a modest reduction in overall control through conversion instrument holdings.
17703850.brief: Heights Capital Management increases stake in Faron Pharmaceuticals to 20.52% through direct shares and convertible bonds.
17703850.take: Routine major shareholding disclosure showing a significant investor maintaining substantial influence in the biotech firm; the slight overall decrease suggests consolidation rather than aggressive expansion, likely a non-event for markets.

17703802.summary: Between 17-23 July 2026, Foresight Group purchased 132,378 ordinary shares under its April 2025 buyback programme via Berenberg. Total shares bought back to date: 6,804,153. Share prices ranged from 458.50p (23 July) to 484.50p (20 July), with volume-weighted average prices between 465.71p and 481.42p daily. Post-settlement, 111,195,334 shares retain voting rights; 5,152,469 held in treasury as non-voting.
17703802.brief: Foresight Group completes buyback of 132,378 shares across five trading days, paying 458.50-484.50p per share.
17703802.take: Routine buyback execution within announced programme; demonstrates capital deployment and share count reduction but provides no insight into strategy or valuation views. Market likely neutral.

17703792.summary: Pershing Square Holdings repurchased 33,465 public shares on 23 July 2026 at an average price of 49.65 USD (3,731 pence), with 22,964 shares bought on LSE (PSH ticker) and 10,501 on PSHD ticker. The buyback was executed by Jefferies at NAV of 76.01 USD per share. Post-buyback, PSH has 173.6 million public shares outstanding with 37.3 million held in treasury.
17703792.brief: PSH completes share buyback of 33,465 shares at average price of 49.65 USD on 23 July 2026.
17703792.take: Routine share buyback at discount to NAV (49.65 USD vs 76.01 USD) accretive to remaining shareholders; standard capital management activity with neutral-to-modest positive read from execution below valuation.

17703791.summary: Neuberger Private Equity Partners Limited purchased 30,000 Class A Shares on 23 July 2026 via Jefferies International Limited at prices between £14.50 and £14.66 per share, exercising shareholder-approved buyback authority granted 11 June 2026. All repurchased shares will be cancelled. Outstanding Class A Shares post-cancellation: 40,459,301, with an additional 3,150,408 held in treasury.
17703791.brief: NBPE repurchases 30,000 Class A shares at £14.50-£14.66, to be cancelled.
17703791.take: Routine capital management action reducing share count; modest scale suggests capital-efficient deployment rather than significant shareholder return signal.

17703788.summary: Between 17-23 July 2026, Young & Co's Brewery repurchased 11,716 non-voting shares at an average price of 730.16p and 7,000 A shares at 901.00p under its buyback programme announced 8 July. Non-voting shares will be cancelled; A shares held in treasury. Post-purchase, 22.56m non-voting shares and 38.03m A shares remain in issue.
17703788.brief: Young & Co's Brewery completes share buyback, purchasing 11,716 non-voting and 7,000 A shares.
17703788.take: Routine buyback execution under announced programme; modest capital return to shareholders. Non-event for market—standard treasury management activity with no material strategic implications.
